commit

nodes.title: Heatmap — watch the answer crystallize

properties.text: Pixel = one position x one step. X = positions, Y = steps (top->bottom). WHITE = changed this step (still moving), BLACK = locked in. Black spreading down = the commit front; early + all-at-once = premature crystallization.

widgets_values: Pixel = one position x one step. X = positions, Y = steps (top->bottom). WHITE = changed this step (still moving), BLACK = locked in. Black spreading down = the commit front; early + all-at-once = premature crystallization.

nodes.title: CanvasState — is the answer actually done?

properties.text: Is the text really finished? converged = schedule bottomed out (NOT proof of EOS). turn_closed = a real stop was hit. committed_fraction / steps_used = how far it got. Tell: converged=True but turn_closed=False = looks done, didn't finish.

widgets_values: Is the text really finished? converged = schedule bottomed out (NOT proof of EOS). turn_closed = a real stop was hit. committed_fraction / steps_used = how far it got. Tell: converged=True but turn_closed=False = looks done, didn't finish.

nodes.title: Trace Summary — the run's vitals

properties.text: Run vitals: scheduler + knobs, steps actually taken, and the avalanche curve (committed fraction per step, climbing to 1.0). Steep early climb = committed hard and fast, maybe a wrong basin. Also confirms no fixed MASK sentinel.

widgets_values: Run vitals: scheduler + knobs, steps actually taken, and the avalanche curve (committed fraction per step, climbing to 1.0). Steep early climb = committed hard and fast, maybe a wrong basin. Also confirms no fixed MASK sentinel.
google/diffusiongemma-26B-A4B-it
none

nodes.title: Model & hardware

properties.text: First run auto-downloads ~53 GB (bf16) from HuggingFace and caches it. Wants >=60 GB GPU; smaller cards offload and slow. quant=none only. local_files_only = run offline once cached.

widgets_values: First run auto-downloads ~53 GB (bf16) from HuggingFace and caches it. Wants >=60 GB GPU; smaller cards offload and slow. quant=none only. local_files_only = run offline once cached.

nodes.title: Knobs to play with

properties.text: steps = denoise passes. t_min/t_max = temperature window (hotter/longer delays commitment). entropy_bound + confidence = what freezes each step. gen_length = canvas size. thinking = reasoning channel. Try: steps 48, t 0.4-0.8, eb 0.05, conf 0.005.

widgets_values: steps = denoise passes. t_min/t_max = temperature window (hotter/longer delays commitment). entropy_bound + confidence = what freezes each step. gen_length = canvas size. thinking = reasoning channel. Try: steps 48, t 0.4-0.8, eb 0.05, conf 0.005.
dgemma_run_log
/srv/dev/DG-runs/

nodes.title: What this is

properties.text: Diffusion text: the model denoises a whole token canvas over N steps, not left-to-right. This graph lets you watch it crystallize. Observability, not speed.

widgets_values: Diffusion text: the model denoises a whole token canvas over N steps, not left-to-right. This graph lets you watch it crystallize. Observability, not speed.
Generate 23 random numerals, then complete a table with a count of the instances of each numeral.
